title: [codereview-P2] slip_transport: k_thread_create has no error check
close_reason: Fixed k_thread_create missing error handling by adding project-standard comment explaining static allocation makes failure impossible at runtime + Kconfig priority range validation (cross-ref tvfm.73 ybal.11). Added defensive check+LOG_DBG for k_thread_name_set (consistent with lora_l2.c). Applied identical fix to kiss_transport.c for completeness. Ran 3 codereview passes (thread init patterns, Kconfig ranges, test coverage, Zephyr API conformance). slip_transport ztest builds and passes. No other similar unhandled cases found in transports.
